---
title: "Beatrice Esther Rosenthal"
---

## Beatrice Esther Rosenthal

**Dates:** ((b. Hampstead 1875/6-1953)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1897)

### Biography

Daughter of the Rev.Michael Rosenthal, Vicar of St. Mark's Aldgate, she published other religious works and hymns; and married Canon William Moore (d. 1943); she was editor of <i>Mothers in Council</i> until 1950.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
